user.title: 🏷️ Add NetBox Asset Tag
user.description: Connect Home Assistant to NetBox for device asset-tag enrichment.

reconfigure.title: 🏷️ Reconfigure NetBox Asset Tag
reconfigure.description: Update the connection settings. Leave the API token empty to keep the current one.

abort.already_configured: This NetBox instance is already configured.

sync_to_netbox.name: Sync to NetBox
sync_to_netbox.description: Sync matched Home Assistant devices to NetBox, updating their location and status (active / inventory).

device_id.name: Devices
device_id.description: One or more devices to sync. Leave empty to sync all coordinator-matched devices.

write_asset_tag_to_device.name: Write asset tag to device
write_asset_tag_to_device.description: Write the matched NetBox asset tag to compatible physical devices. Shelly devices with KVS support store it under the netbox-asset-tag key.

device_id.name: Devices
device_id.description: One or more devices to write to. Leave empty to write all coordinator-matched compatible devices.

data.enable_weak_matching: 🧪 Enable weaker serial matching from raw integration identifiers
data.write_asset_tag_to_devices: 🏷️ Enable writing asset tags to compatible devices

data_description.write_asset_tag_to_devices: When enabled, compatible physical devices get a diagnostic button that writes the NetBox asset tag to the device itself. Shelly devices with KVS support are supported first.

data.ha_url_field: 🔗 NetBox custom field name for HA device URL

data_description.ha_url_field: Only used when 'HA device URL' is selected above. The custom field must already exist in NetBox.
data_description.auto_sync: When enabled, devices are synced to NetBox automatically on every coordinator refresh and whenever their area, name, or disabled state changes in Home Assistant.
